title: LIFEBOAT DAY SHELTER AND NAVIGATION CENTER - 211info
text: DAYTIME NAVIGATION SHELTER LIFEBOAT DAY SHELTER AND NAVIGATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a daytime drop-in center with access to socks, laundry facilities, Wi-Fi, computer and telephone access, fax, coffee, snacks, a clothing closet, assistance in navigating social services, and specialized information and referral. Camping gear may be available, depending on donations. 1076 Franklin Avenue Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Saturday/Sunday 6am-6pm, Thursday/Friday 8am-6pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clatsop County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Entrance on 11th street Services: General Clothing Provision * Homelessness Issues Homeless Drop In Centers Laundry Facilities * Homelessness Issues Public Internet Access Sites * Homelessness Issues Public Showers/Baths * Homelessness Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues Telephone Facilities * Homelessness Issues Underwear/Sleepwear * Homelessness Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DAYTIME NAVIGATION SHELTER
